/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_conjunction_performance.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_conjunction_performance.dir/tests/test_conjunction_performance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_conjunction_performance.dir/propagator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_conjunction_performance.dir/conjunction.cpp.o -o test_conjunction_performance
